2025-26 Murray State Racers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 20-13 (12-8, 3rd in MVC MBB)

Coach: Ryan Miller

PS/G: 83.1 (32nd of 365)

PA/G: 80.2 (334th of 365)

SRS: 3.25 (120th of 365)

SOS: 0.37 (133rd of 365)

ORtg: 115.0 (71st of 365)

DRtg: 111.0 (287th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +150000
